
% set theory
\providecommand{\Image}{\operatorname{im}}
\providecommand{\Into}{\hookrightarrow}
\providecommand{\Onto}{\twoheadrightarrow}
\providecommand{\Isomorphism}{\xrightarrow{\cong}}
\providecommand{\Functions}{\operatorname{Func}}

% blackboard bold
\providecommand{\Ab}{\mathbb{A}}
\providecommand{\Bb}{\mathbb{B}}
\providecommand{\Cb}{\mathbb{C}}
\providecommand{\Db}{\mathbb{D}}
\providecommand{\Eb}{\mathbb{E}}
\providecommand{\Fb}{\mathbb{F}}
\providecommand{\Gb}{\mathbb{G}}
\providecommand{\Hb}{\mathbb{H}}
\providecommand{\Ib}{\mathbb{I}}
\providecommand{\Jb}{\mathbb{J}}
\providecommand{\Kb}{\mathbb{K}}
\providecommand{\Lb}{\mathbb{L}}
\providecommand{\Mb}{\mathbb{M}}
\providecommand{\Nb}{\mathbb{N}}
\providecommand{\Ob}{\mathbb{O}}
\providecommand{\Pb}{\mathbb{P}}
\providecommand{\Qb}{\mathbb{Q}}
\providecommand{\Rb}{\mathbb{R}}
\providecommand{\Sb}{\mathbb{S}}
\providecommand{\Tb}{\mathbb{T}}
\providecommand{\Ub}{\mathbb{U}}
\providecommand{\Vb}{\mathbb{V}}
\providecommand{\Wb}{\mathbb{W}}
\providecommand{\Xb}{\mathbb{X}}
\providecommand{\Yb}{\mathbb{Y}}
\providecommand{\Zb}{\mathbb{Z}}

% group theory
\providecommand{\Pure}[1]{\mathcal{P}_{#1}}
\providecommand{\Braid}[1]{\mathcal{B}_{#1}}
\providecommand{\Symmetric}[1]{\mathcal{S}_{#1}}
\providecommand{\Cyclic}[1]{\mathcal{C}_{#1}}
\providecommand{\Modular}[1]{\mathbb{Z}/{#1}\mathbb{Z}}
\providecommand{\Dihedral}[1]{\mathcal{D}_{#1}}
\providecommand{\Alternating}[1]{\mathcal{A}_{#1}}
\providecommand{\Klein}{\mathcal{V}}
\providecommand{\Quaternion}[1][8]{\mathcal{Q}_{#1}}
\providecommand{\Permutation}[1]{\operatorname{Perm}(#1)}
\providecommand{\ConjugacyClass}[2][]{\operatorname{cl}_{#1}({#2})}
\providecommand{\Center}[1]{\mathbf{Z}(#1)}
\providecommand{\Normal}{\unlhd}
\providecommand{\Acts}{⟳}
\providecommand{\Fix}{\operatorname{Fix}}
\providecommand{\Stabilizer}[2][]{\operatorname{Stab}_{#1}({#2})}
\providecommand{\Orbit}[2][]{\operatorname{Orb}_{#1}({#2})}
\providecommand{\Centralizer}[2][]{\operatorname{C}_{#1}({#2})}
\providecommand{\Abelianization}[1]{{#1}^{\mathrm{Ab}}}

% algebra
\providecommand{\Hom}{\operatorname{Hom}}
\providecommand{\End}{\operatorname{End}}
\providecommand{\Aut}{\operatorname{Aut}}
\providecommand{\Id}{\mathbb{I}}

% fields
\providecommand{\Characteristic}{\operatorname{char}}

% linear algebra
\providecommand{\Mat}{\operatorname{Mat}}
\providecommand{\Span}{\operatorname{Span}}
\providecommand{\Null}{\operatorname{Null}}
\providecommand{\Rank}{\operatorname{rank}}
\providecommand{\Trace}{\operatorname{Tr}}
\providecommand{\Diagonal}{\operatorname{Diag}}
\providecommand{\GL}{\operatorname{GL}}
\providecommand{\SL}{\operatorname{SL}}
\providecommand{\Orthogonal}{\operatorname{O}}
\providecommand{\SO}{\operatorname{SO}}
\providecommand{\Unitary}{\operatorname{U}}
\providecommand{\SU}{\operatorname{SU}}
\providecommand{\SymmetricPower}[2][]{\operatorname{Sym}^{#1}({#2})}

% category theory
\providecommand{\catname}[1]{\mathsf{#1}}
\providecommand{\VectorSpaces}[1]{\catname{Vect}_{#1}}

% calculus (no diffcoeff)
\providecommand{\dl}[1]{\mathop{}\!\mathrm{d}#1}
\providecommand{\dln}[2]{\mathop{}\!\mathrm{d}^{#2}#1}
\ifdefined\diff\else
  \providecommand{\diff}[2]{\frac{\dl{#1}}{\dl{#2}}}
\fi
\providecommand{\diffn}[3]{\frac{\dln{#1}{#3}}{\dl{#2}^{#3}}}
\providecommand{\dlp}[1]{\mathop{}\!\partial #1}
\ifdefined\diffp\else
  \providecommand{\diffp}[2]{\frac{\dlp{#1}}{\dlp{#2}}}
\fi
\providecommand{\diffpn}[3]{\frac{\partial^{#3} #1}{\partial #2^{#3}}}
\providecommand{\Divergence}{\operatorname{div}}
\providecommand{\Curl}{\operatorname{curl}}
\providecommand{\Gradient}{\operatorname{grad}}
\providecommand{\D}{\mathrm{D}}
\providecommand{\I}{\mathrm{I}}
